name: Ilustrato Pictures International Inc.
summary: Business Overview ILUS is a corporation registered in Nevada and operating out of New York and Dubai. The company is primarily focused on delivering value to its shareholders through innovation and growth. It has acquired and integrated businesses in the global industries of technology, engineering, and manufacturing, with a specific focus on public safety.
